name: Basecamp
description: Monitor Basecamp project management platform for team access and collaboration compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Register an app at https://launchpad.37signals.com/integrations
2. Authorize the app to get an access token
3. Find your account ID in your Basecamp URL
4. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 access token from Basecamp. Authorize via https://launchpad.37signals.com/authorization/new

credentialFields.label: Account ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Basecamp account ID — visible in your Basecamp URL: https://3.basecamp.com/{account_id}/

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Basecamp team members with access to projects and collaboration data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Basecamp project management platform is operational
